title: lolium perenne subsp. cristatum
intro: Lolium perenne subsp. cristatum, also known as Crested Perennial Ryegrass, is a subspecies of Lolium perenne, a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and its anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating urinary tract issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lolium perenne subsp. cristatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
